lakeStrings.originalSentence: [narrator over speakers] Extreme temperatures and treacherous weather events make life outside the cities of Arrakis truly hostile, with sandstorms powerful enough to cut through metal.
lakeStrings.subject: arrakis
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around arrakis, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: Only the native tribes known as the Fremen have adapted well enough to survive.
